## Summary

Describe the problem this change addresses and the approach you took.

## Validation

Describe how you validated the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to one logical piece of work.
- [ ] I updated docs or templates when behavior or contributor guidance changed.
- [ ] I used the relevant issue or proposal for context when available.
- [ ] I did not disclose sensitive information in the PR description, code, or attachments.
